featureName: BUG-024-003: docs/Development.md L31 connector-count drift (15 → 16, missing QF Decisions) + missing forward-detection runtime guard + spec.md R-006/R-PRD-011/AC-5/problem-statement/goals/UC-003/scenarios internal inconsistency with BS-004

completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: Created BUG-024-003 8-artifact packet for 3 chaos findings discovered in sweep-2026-05-24-r10 round 9 (mode: stochastic-quality-sweep, parent-expanded child mode: chaos-hardening) on specs/024-design-doc-reconciliation: F1 HIGH docs/Development.md L31 stale at '- 15 passive connectors (...)' with 15-item parenthetical missing QF Decisions despite BUG-024-002 closure reconciling docs/smackerel.md §22.7+§24-A to 16; F2 MEDIUM no framework guard or runtime contract test pins 3-surface agreement between cmd/core/connectors.go slice literal + docs/smackerel.md §22.7 header + docs/Development.md '- N passive connectors' bullet (BUG-024-002 closed observable drift but added no forward-detection); F3 LOW spec.md R-006/R-PRD-011/AC-5/problem statement/goals/UC-003/Gherkin scenario internally contradicted BS-004 (16-item list updated by BUG-024-002) with 5 sites still saying 15. Parent spec 024 stays status: done; no runtime path is changed — only 1 docs line + 8 spec.md edits + 1 new Go test file + parent governance backfill.

Confirmed ground truth via codebase inspection: cmd/core/connectors.go L49-53 slice literal contains 16 connector identifiers (5+5+6 across 3 lines); find internal/connector -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d -not -name photos -not -name adapters returns 16 directories matching the slice; docs/smackerel.md §22.7 header reads '### 22.7 Committed Connector Inventory (16 connectors)' (BUG-024-002 closure); docs/Development.md L31 reads '- 15 passive connectors (...)' with QF Decisions missing from the parenthetical (F1); no internal/deploy/*_contract_test.go file pins 3-surface agreement (F2); spec.md grep returned 6 lines containing '15' against committed/implemented/connectors (F3 — problem statement L9, hard constraints L23, goals L33, UC-003 L84, scenarios L219, R-006 L217-235, R-PRD-011 L211, AC-5). Single scope decision: bundle F1+F2+F3 into one Scope 1 because all three findings share a single root cause (incomplete propagation of qfdecisions across documented surfaces) and close with coordinated edits + one new test.

Authored design.md with 3-Layer architecture (Layer 1 docs/Development.md + spec.md textual edits; Layer 2 new internal/deploy/docs_connector_count_contract_test.go forward-detection contract test with assertConnectorCountContract pure function + TestConnectorCountContract_LiveFile + 3 adversarial sub-tests; Layer 3 parent spec 024 governance backfill state.json + report.md). Current Truth table grounded in cmd/core/connectors.go L49-53 / docs/smackerel.md §22.7 header / docs/Development.md L31 / find internal/connector evidence. 5-Iteration execution plan with exact line numbers and verbatim edit text. Verification Checklist 5 items mapped to Test Plan.

Authored scopes.md with single Scope 1 ('Reconcile docs/Development.md + spec.md R-006 + add forward-detection contract test') containing 5 SCN-001..SCN-005 Gherkin scenarios (docs/Development.md L31 reconcile, spec.md R-006/R-PRD-011/AC-5+ propagation to BS-004 parity, new Go contract test pins 3-surface agreement, parent spec 024 governance backfill, single atomic commit with bubbles(024/bug-024-003) prefix). Test Plan includes Regression E2E + Stress + canary rows + Shared Infrastructure Impact Sweep enumerating 5 downstream consumer surfaces + Change Boundary section with explicit allowed/excluded surfaces. Applied all 5 design.md Iterations across 6 files: (1) docs/Development.md L31 single-line edit '- 15 passive connectors (...)' → '- 16 passive connectors (...QF Decisions companion via spec 041 read-only packet flow)'; (2) specs/024-design-doc-reconciliation/spec.md 8 edits across problem statement L9, hard constraints L23, goals L33, UC-003 L84, scenarios L219, R-PRD-011 L211 (15 → 16), R-006 intro + bulleted list extended with qfdecisions 16th entry preserving Principle 10 boundary text 'no financial advice generation', AC-5 (15 → 16 committed connectors); (3) new internal/deploy/docs_connector_count_contract_test.go (~360 LOC) with assertConnectorCountContract pure function + TestConnectorCountContract_LiveFile + TestConnectorCountContract_AdversarialConnectorsGoLow + TestConnectorCountContract_AdversarialSmackerelMdHigh + TestConnectorCountContract_AdversarialDevelopmentMdLow using existing repoRoot helper from compose_contract_test.go; (4) BUG packet 8 artifacts (bug.md, spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, report.md, state.json, uservalidation.md); (5) parent spec 024 state.json + report.md backfill. No runtime/schema/NATS/compose/web template/prompt contract/Telegram command/deploy script changes.

Ran ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run TestConnectorCountContract --verbose — all 4 new tests PASS: TestConnectorCountContract_LiveFile (live cmd/core/connectors.go + docs/smackerel.md + docs/Development.md all agree on 16, contract OK message logged); TestConnectorCountContract_AdversarialConnectorsGoLow (synthetic 15-entry connectors.go rejected with precise 'cmd/core/connectors.go=15, docs/smackerel.md §22.7=16, docs/Development.md=16' diagnostic); TestConnectorCountContract_AdversarialSmackerelMdHigh (synthetic 17-claim smackerel.md rejected with precise 'cmd/core/connectors.go=16, docs/smackerel.md §22.7=17, docs/Development.md=16' diagnostic); TestConnectorCountContract_AdversarialDevelopmentMdLow (synthetic 15-bullet Development.md rejected with precise 'cmd/core/connectors.go=16, docs/smackerel.md §22.7=16, docs/Development.md=15' diagnostic — the exact F1 regression now mechanically caught). Full internal/deploy test suite (21.354s) green; no regression in prior 20 contract tests.
